name: bmkrs.com
description: BMKRS - Digital Design Agency React Application
author: BMKRS

notes.cdn: This project uses CDN-hosted libraries (React, ReactDOM, Babel, React Motion) loaded directly in HTML files. Dependencies listed here are for reference only.
notes.babel: Using Babel Standalone 6.26.0 via CDN for in-browser JSX transpilation
notes.architecture: Hybrid React + legacy jQuery application with shared components and page-specific entry points
